descriptionShort: Red Deer Rustlers defeat Richmond Sockeyes 7-1 Sunday in Centennial Cup semifinal, evening best-of-seven series at 2-2.
descriptionLong: The Red Deer Rustlers swept back-to-back games against Richmond Sockeyes over the weekend, winning 6-3 Saturday and 7-1 Sunday to tie their best-of-seven Centennial Cup western semifinal at 2-2. Goaltender Ken Weiss delivered a strong performance for the Rustlers, who rallied after losing the first two games in Richmond 11-4 and 6-4. Coach Larry Billows credited hard play and physical contact, noting the Sockeyes struggled with the Rustlers' aggressive style.

attribution.headline: All Richmond Sockeyes Can Do Is Watch Helplessly
